name: Kitsune in heat - Tamamo-No-Mae
description:
The end of new year, after the celebrations sadly there is something that has to be done each year, seal Tamamo before she loses control of herself and tries to assault you.

Days after she gets confined and the winter gets colder, you notice something, the chaldean staff forgot to give her supplies for the winter. You decide to go and give them to her yourself, after all is a quick visit, nothing can go wrong...
creator: Haxiz
